criteria.name: AI Music Generation Quality
criteria.description: The ability of the app to generate high-quality, original music in various genres and styles using AI algorithms.
criteria.sources: User reviews, expert opinions, and audio quality analysis

criteria.name: Customization Options
criteria.description: The degree to which users can customize the generated music, including tempo, key, instrumentation, and structure.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, feature lists, and user guides

criteria.name: Ease of Use
criteria.description: How user-friendly and intuitive the app is for both beginners and experienced musicians.
criteria.sources: User reviews, interface analysis, and usability testing

criteria.name: Learning and Practice Features
criteria.description: The availability of AI-powered tools for learning music, practicing instruments, and improving vocal skills.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, feature lists, and user testimonials

criteria.name: Pricing and Accessibility
criteria.description: The cost of the app and its accessibility to a wide range of users, including free options and subscription plans.
criteria.sources: App store listings, pricing pages, and user reviews
